owner_authorization: The owner accepted the corporate-action scope restriction on 2026-07-15, requested that further source search pause, and directed prospective discrepancy testing through a future E0 paper-trade dry run without opening validation returns.

basis.observed_scope: Sixteen locked Alpha Vantage payloads produced 772 current-snapshot corporate-action rows. Eleven of sixteen pre-2016 symbol-endpoint pairs reconciled exactly with Yahoo; five dividend pairs did not.
basis.reason_for_acceptance: The owner prefers to preserve the unresolved historical difference as an explicit E1 limitation rather than spend more time or money on point-in-time data before operational feasibility is known.
basis.historical_claim_limit: A future prospective dry run cannot prove that historical discrepancies were immaterial, correct past adjusted returns, or convert E1 evidence into E2.

reopen_triggers: A free or already-owned source with genuine point-in-time revision provenance becomes available.
The future E0 shadow-accounting dry run finds a preregistered material operational discrepancy.
The broker or paper environment cannot provide an auditable event, cash, and unit ledger.
The owner explicitly changes the E1-only scope or requests an E2 validation path.

prospective_shadow_accounting.purpose: Observe whether corporate-action source differences create operationally material cash, unit, target-weight, or rebalance-order differences prospectively.
prospective_shadow_accounting.insufficient_event_rule: If the dry run observes too few relevant events, report insufficient operational evidence and extend or stop; do not infer that historical differences were small.

next_safe_action: Complete the Webull Thailand read-only capability probe without previewing or placing an order. Only after broker capability is known may a separate owner-approved and hash-locked E0 shadow-accounting dry-run preregistration be designed.

source_lineage.use: B4.4 result and unresolved current-snapshot limitation.
An E0 paper dry run tests operations only and carries no edge claim.
Research decisions must distinguish revise, paper trade, and deploy, with written stop conditions.
